Build a ModuleSet from a Seurat object with an hdWGCNA experiment

Source: R/moduleset_hdwgcna.R
hdWGCNA_ModuleSet.Rd

The only ModuleSet adapter that touches Seurat/hdWGCNA directly; every core evidence tool depends only on the generic ModuleSet contract (modules(), gene_membership(), module_scores(), expression(), metadata(), pkg_versions()), never on this backend.

Usage

hdWGCNA_ModuleSet(seurat_obj, wgcna_name = NULL)

# S3 method for class 'hdWGCNA_ModuleSet'
modules(ms, include_grey = FALSE, ...)

# S3 method for class 'hdWGCNA_ModuleSet'
gene_membership(ms, module, ...)

# S3 method for class 'hdWGCNA_ModuleSet'
module_scores(ms, module = NULL, ...)

# S3 method for class 'hdWGCNA_ModuleSet'
expression(ms, ...)

# S3 method for class 'hdWGCNA_ModuleSet'
metadata(ms, ...)

# S3 method for class 'hdWGCNA_ModuleSet'
pkg_versions(ms, ...)

# S3 method for class 'hdWGCNA_ModuleSet'
capabilities(ms, ...)

Arguments

seurat_obj

A Seurat object with an hdWGCNA experiment attached (i.e. run through the hdWGCNA pipeline).

wgcna_name

Name of the hdWGCNA experiment to read from. Defaults to whichever experiment is currently active on seurat_obj.

ms

A ModuleSet object; the dispatch target for the generic methods below (modules(), gene_membership(), module_scores(), expression(), metadata(), pkg_versions(), capabilities()).

include_grey

Include hdWGCNA's 'grey' bucket for unassigned genes (not a real co-expression module). Default FALSE.

...

Passed to methods.

module

A single module id, as returned by modules().

Value

An hdWGCNA_ModuleSet object.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
library(Seurat)
seurat_obj <- readRDS('my_hdwgcna_object.rds')
ms <- hdWGCNA_ModuleSet(seurat_obj)
modules(ms)
} # }

On this page
